title: Internal error: Input vector
body:
Hi,
I got this assertion with version 6e5ed73.

```
Internal error: Input vector expected width=7, got bit=1'bX, base=0, vwid=6
Assertion failed: (bits4_.size() == vwid), function filter_vec4, file vvp_net_sig.cc, line 900.
```
code_blocks:
Internal error: Input vector expected width=7, got bit=1'bX, base=0, vwid=6
Assertion failed: (bits4_.size() == vwid), function filter_vec4, file vvp_net_sig.cc, line 900.
